abilities.name: Elusive
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Humiliation
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model must discard a card.

actions.name: Blackmail
actions.effects: Target must either discard a (c) or this model may draw a card and increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

triggers.name: Media Deluge
triggers.text: This model declares the Interact action, ignoring engagement.

actions.name: Flash Photography
actions.effects: Target gains an Entranced token. If this action receives a raise, increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

triggers.name: Foiled Plans
triggers.text: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Follow a Lead
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Either remove a Scheme marker within 6" or decrease this crew's scandal bar by 2.
